response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in C++ at a professional scale, which is a hard minimum requirement, and shows no evidence of leading cloud compute infrastructure projects or mentoring engineers in cloud/DevOps contexts despite 15+ years of general software experience.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong open-source contributions and technical mentoring through workshops
Proven ability to own ambiguous projects and deliver complex systems
concerns: No verifiable professional C++ experience beyond academic or minor use
No evidence of cloud compute platform leadership or distributed systems architecture
Lacks documented experience in technical leadership or mentoring cloud engineers
